summary: The AI agent failed to appropriately respond to the patient's urgent symptoms, leading to a critical communication breakdown.

issues.title: Failure to Address Urgent Symptoms
issues.details: The agent abruptly ended the call without addressing the patient's reported symptoms of chest tightness and shoulder pain, which are potentially serious. This is a critical failure in triaging urgent symptoms.
issues.expected: The agent should have acknowledged the symptoms, assessed the urgency, and offered to schedule an appointment or provide guidance on next steps.
